description_long: This rifle features a striking, custom-painted design with a vivid palette of purples, reds, greens, and blues, giving it a surreal, almost monstrous appearance. The body is adorned with stylized, organic shapes resembling teeth and sinew, particularly along the receiver and stock, suggesting a fantasy or sci-fi theme. The stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped, with angular, aggressive contours and a prominent cheek rest. The magazine is a detachable box type, slightly curved and black, contrasting with the colorful body. The barrel is standard length and appears to be unadorned except for a small, dark muzzle device. The rifle includes a raised rail system on top, but no visible optics or advanced sighting systems are attached.
description: A vividly painted, fantasy-themed rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and organic, monstrous motifs in purple, red, green, and blue. The rifle features a standard barrel and a rail system without visible optics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the colorful, organic design and the fixed stock with a cheek rest.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow barrel profile and the symmetry of the rifle's design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stylized teeth motif along the receiver and the curved magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock, showing its green and ribbed buttplate.
